questions.text: Which value best approximates the force needed to lift a backpack containing three high school math textbooks?
Which value best approximates the force needed to lift a feather?
Which value best approximates the force needed to turn a doorknob?
Which value best approximates the weight of an adult human?
You are measuring a force with a force-meter that has a maximum value of 20 Newtons. It records a value of 1 Newton. Which would be the BEST next step to take?

answerChoices.text: Write 1 Newton down and your measurement.
Use a force meter with a higher maximum value.
Use a force meter with a lower maximum value for better accuracy.

questions.text: You are measuring a force with a force-meter that has a maximum value of 5 Newtons. It hits its maximum value. Which would be the BEST next step to take?

answerChoices.text: Write 5 Newtons down and your measurement.
Use a force meter with a higher maximum value.
Use a force meter with a lower maximum value for better accuracy.

questions.text: You are lifting a backpack to record a force. The highest maximum force meters you have has a maximum of 20 Newtons, but those max out when lifting the backpack. How should you proceed?

answerChoices.text: Write a note saying it is impossible to measure the force accurately.
Use more than one 20 N force meter in parallel (each one gripping the backpack independently)?
Use more than one 20 N force meter in series (each one gripping the next force meter in a chain)?
